channel.title: Java on Yutong Jin
channel.description: Recent content in Java on Yutong Jin

item.title: 359BookMarkers
item.description:
Overview

359BookMarkers is an early Java implementation of the bookmarking project thread. The repo contains a Java source tree plus compiled output, which suggests it was one of the first working versions rather than just a planning repo.

What It Represents

  • moving from scaffold to implementation
  • early Java application structure
  • a concrete iteration of the bookmarking idea

Stack

  • Java

Repo

  • GitHub: yutongjin/359BookMarkers

item.title: 359 Final ABS-ABS
item.description:
Overview

This repo looks like another course-project branch in Java, likely focused on final-project packaging and class structure experimentation. The repo is small, but it sits in the same period as the other 359 project work and seems to represent a parallel or intermediate implementation line.

What It Represents

  • final-project iteration work
  • Java code organization around a course deliverable
  • experimentation before the later, more complete 359FFFF repo

Stack

  • Java

Repo

  • GitHub: yutongjin/359_Final_ABS-ABS-

item.title: 359FFFF
item.description:
Overview

359FFFF looks like the most complete version of the 359 project line. The repo includes Java code, UI assets, UML files, and both SQLite and MySQL drivers, which strongly suggests this was the polished desktop-app variant of the BookMarkers work.

What It Represents

  • the most production-like 359 repo
  • Java UI work plus local database integration
  • a version where structure, assets, and dependencies were all brought together

Stack

  • Java
  • HTML/CSS
  • SQLite
  • MySQL connector
  • JFoenix UI library

Repo

  • GitHub: yutongjin/359FFFF

item.title: NorthEast
item.description:
Overview

NorthEast is a Java/Maven project with ANTLR-generated code plus frontend assets. Even with a sparse README, the structure suggests a project that combined language tooling or parsing work with a browser-facing layer, which makes it different from the earlier CRUD-style app repos.

What It Represents

  • a more technical Java project shape
  • parser or language-processing work through ANTLR
  • combining backend logic with a user-facing interface

Stack

  • Java
  • Maven
  • ANTLR
  • HTML/CSS/JavaScript

Repo

  • GitHub: yutongjin/NorthEast
